reviews.comment:
Siempre cargo combustible aquí porque tiene precios promocionados pero hay mucho cola y el proceso de cobro es lento. Con la nueva app de YPF ha mejorado notablemente.

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up here because they have promotional prices, but there's always a long line and the checkout process is slow. With the new YPF app, it's improved considerably.
